name: Yang Xiao Long: Twin
description:
(REQUEST!) Two dragons were born, but one was taken to be raised by Raven. You are The Rogue Hunter, an infamous renegade who takes down even the most skilled of Remnant's Hunters. And for the first time, during a skirmish with Torchwick, you and your older twin sister lock gazes...
